name: Monolith-dark
author: ImAsra
description: Monochrome charcoal and white neumorphic theme with circular record player esque album grid patches.

1.2.3: Fix: collapsed sidebar nav buttons are now square and icon-sized.
1.2.2: Fix: the album rail's prev/next arrows work again. The card shadow now gets room inside the rail instead of switching off its overflow, which had disabled the arrows.
1.2.1: made volume slider more visible by making it slightly brighter
1.2.0: New: player-bar glow when playing (player-bar + ::before glow + accent text shadow for playing track).
Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
